# Page 1^page=1
AAS Solution Summit 2026 Agenda Date/Time: 11. June 2026, 10:00h – 17:00h with Barbeque Get-together starting at 18:00h Location IDTA, Lyoner Straße 18, 60528 Frankfurt (c/o VDMA) 9:30 Registration | Welcome Coffee 01 | 10:00 Opening and Introduction • Agenda • News from the IDTA Meik Billmann, IDTA 02 | 10:15 Pitch Block #1 (15 min per Pitch) • Topic: Battery Pass as a special case of DPP • Standardized Data Exchange Across the Lifecycle: ABB’s AAS Initiative for Industrial Engineering Use Cases • Industrial BaSyx – from open source to an industrial production solution • Q&A (5 min) Michael Roegner, HEITEC Nafise Eskandari, ABB Alwin Hoffmann, Xitaso Frank Schnicke, Fraunhofer IESE 03 | 11:05 Conplements Customer Solution Efficient creation and seamless integration of digital twins with the twinsphere Suite Christian Günther, Conplement 11:35 Coffee Break #1 | Marketplace 03 | 12:05 Pitch Block #2 (15 min per Pitch) • Topic: Product Change Notifications • Asset Data eXchange Hub – Shared Services for AAS-based Data Exchange • Siemens Assetfox enables standardized X-Company Data Exchange with AAS • Tag It, Twin It, Track It: Low-Effort Digital Product Passports at Scale • Q&A (5 min) Thorsten Jankowski, EPLAN Sandeep Rudra, IDTA Arastoo Barji, Siemens Peter Hensel, Codewerk

# Page 2^page=2
13:10 Lunch Break | Marketplace 04 | 14:20 Pitch Block #3 (15 min per Pitch) • Topic: Business Network Asset Collaboration • COMOS and Teamcenter: Benefits of using AAS in both engineering systems with Siemens Data Exchange Connect (DxC) • Open Source as an Architectural Decision: Making AAS Productive • Q&A (5 min) Oleksandra Ostapenko, SAP Christian Noppenberger, Siemens Rolf Engesser, M&M Software Dr. Jens Achenbach, M&M Software 05 | 15:10 Neoceptions Customer Solution Tdb. Adrian Grüner, Neoception 15:40 Coffee Break #2 | Marketplace 06 | 16:10 Solve the DPP with the AAS and create added value Juilee Tikekar, IDTA 07 | 16:25 User Perspective: AAS as a solution in the pharmaceutical industry Tbc. 08 | 16:45 Presentation of the Winner of the AAS Solution Award 2026 Meik Billmann, IDTA 17:00 Closing of the Solution Summit 2026 18:00- 21:00 Barbeque get-together @ Astropark, Lyoner Straße 9 in walking distance from the summit venue

# Page 3^page=3
Date/Time: 12. June 2026, 9:00h – 11:00h Location IDTA, Lyoner Straße 18, 60528 Frankfurt (c/o VDMA) 9:00- 11:00 Workshop #1: Asset Data eXchange Hub (MX Port Leo) How to get started with AAS-based data sharing. Sandeep Rudra, IDTA 9:00- 11:00 Workshop #2: How to get started with AAS Tbc. Please register individually for the workshops.
